title: papaver alpinum subvar. degenii
intro: Papaver alpinum subvar. degenii, also known as the Alpine Poppy, is a subspecies of the Alpine Poppy plant (Papaver alpinum) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant contains various alkaloids, including isoquinoline and isoquinoline alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subvar. degenii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tincture or infused in oil to create herbal preparations, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally due to potential toxicity and side effects.
